retention.reason: PR #1580 closure depends on explicit end-to-end Memory pull/capture dogfooding evidence, not only implementation tests.
retention.rule: Full #1579 closure requires evidence that relevant Memory was pulled without exact surface wording and reusable learning was captured or routed before completion.

memory_pull.command: uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py memory route --target . --stage closeout --files src/agentic_workspace/workspace_runtime_primitives.py tests/test_workspace_summary_cli.py --task "Finish the pull capture loop evidence" --format json
memory_pull.evidence_summary: Structured stage/file context found the relevant Memory note without requiring exact prompt wording.

surface_order_robustness.command: uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py memory route --target . --files tests/test_workspace_summary_cli.py --stage closeout --task "Equivalent context in another order" --format json
surface_order_robustness.evidence_summary: Equivalent structured inputs in a different option order returned the same relevant Memory route.

capture_or_route.command: uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py memory capture-note --target . --slug memory-decision-packet-closeout-state-evidence --summary "Closeout Memory decision states are enforced by runtime contract and tests; no new Memory note is needed beyond existing agent-judgment guidance." --files src/agentic_workspace/workspace_runtime_primitives.py tests/test_workspace_summary_cli.py docs/reference/startup-context.md docs/reference/implementer-context.md --stage closeout --task "Route reusable #1579 learning before completion" --format json
capture_or_route.applied_change: Updated the existing Memory note with the #1579 route/capture verification and last-confirmed date.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The PR includes runtime support, root command support, state-level tests, schema docs, dogfooding route evidence, and applied Memory capture evidence for the full #1579 pull/capture loop.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Relevant Memory route found the existing note by structured closeout/file context with task_used_for_matching=false; capture-note routed reusable learning to the existing Memory owner and the note was updated.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen if Memory route stops finding the note from structured stage/file context, or if closeout can no longer distinguish no-write, dismissed, capture, routed, and unresolved states.

proof_report.validation proof: root Memory route/capture dogfooding commands; focused packet/Memory pytest; uv run python scripts/generate/generate_command_packages.py --check; make schema-reference-docs; make check-planning; make test-workspace; make lint-workspace
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: Root Memory route/capture dogfooding commands passed; focused blackbox and Memory tests passed; generated package check passed; schema-reference docs passed; check-planning passed; workspace tests and lint passed.

durable_residue.learned constraint: Memory pull/capture closure must show both route evidence and a capture-or-route decision; prompt wording alone is not evidence.
